cards.name: Strike
cards.notes: Full /inspect 2026-03-21: 6/6 methods PASS. Design quality 7/10. Starter card working as intended.

cards.name: Overheal
cards.notes: Shows ×2 (0) when condition not met — confusing

cards.notes: Purple border despite BUFF type — should be gold

cards.name: Slow
cards.notes: Card text broader than mechanic — says 'next action' but only skips defend/buff

systems.name: Inscription System
systems.description: Inscription cards played once, persist for rest of combat, exhausted on play (removed from game). Fury/Iron/Wisdom hook points. AR-204.
systems.notes: Infrastructure only — card definitions ship in AR-206/AR-208

systems.name: Card Browser UI
systems.description: Shared mid-combat overlay for browsing card piles (draw/discard/exhaust). Used by Tutor, Mimic CC, Scavenge, Siphon Knowledge. AR-204.

systems.name: Multi-Choice Popup
systems.description: Generic 2-4 option choice modal. Used by Unstable Flux CC and Phase Shift QP. AR-204.
systems.notes: MultiChoicePopup.svelte — min 48px tap targets, forcePick support

systems.name: Exhaust Pile Viewer
systems.description: CardBrowser wrapper showing all exhausted cards (including Inscriptions). Accessible from CombatHud exhaust count. AR-204.

systems.name: Card Unlock Gating
systems.description: Character-level-based mechanic unlock schedule. Cards are gated by level, unlocking in cohorts from level 0 (36 mechanics) to level 13 (92 mechanics). All 31 existing mechanics are at level 0 for backward compatibility. Filter applied in buildRunPool/buildPresetRunPool.
systems.notes: No UI in AR-205. Locked card display UI belongs to AR-209.

mysteryEvents.name: Strict Librarian
mysteryEvents.description: Remove card + heal OR take damage

mysteryEvents.name: Knowledge Tax
mysteryEvents.description: Pay gold to heal OR take damage

mysteryEvents.name: Desperate Bargain
mysteryEvents.description: Sacrifice max HP to thin deck

specialEvents.name: Knowledge Spring
specialEvents.description: SM-2 bonus: facts last 1 day longer

statusEffects.name: Poison
statusEffects.description: Damage per turn equal to value

statusEffects.name: Regen
statusEffects.description: Heal per turn equal to value

statusEffects.name: Burn
statusEffects.description: On-hit amplifier: bonus = stacks, then halves. Self-Burn variant for player.
statusEffects.notes: AR-203. On-hit: bonus = stacks, then halves. Self-Burn variant for player.

statusEffects.name: Bleed
statusEffects.description: +1/stack to card-play damage. Decays 1/turn at end of enemy turn.
statusEffects.notes: AR-203. +1/stack to card-play damage. Decays 1/turn at end of enemy turn.

quizSystems.name: Fact Delivery
quizSystems.description: Facts are served correctly from DB, no duplicates in short sequence

quizSystems.name: SM-2 Scheduling
quizSystems.description: Spaced repetition intervals calculated correctly, facts return at right times

quizSystems.name: FSRS Overlay
quizSystems.description: FSRS scheduler overlay on SM-2 works correctly

quizSystems.name: Answer Validation
quizSystems.description: Correct/incorrect detection works for all answer formats

quizSystems.name: Distractor Quality
quizSystems.description: Distractors are plausible and semantically coherent

quizSystems.name: Question Variety
quizSystems.description: No excessive repetition of same fact/variant within a run

quizSystems.name: Domain Filtering
quizSystems.description: Facts filtered correctly per selected domain

quizSystems.name: Multi-Domain Runs
quizSystems.description: Multiple domains in same run work without conflicts

quizSystems.name: Subdeck Selection
quizSystems.description: Subcategory/subdeck filtering works correctly

quizSystems.name: Fact Tier Progression
quizSystems.description: Facts progress through tiers correctly (1->2a->2b->3)

quizSystems.name: Mastery Level Tracking
quizSystems.description: Mastery levels 0-5 tracked correctly per card

quizSystems.name: Speed Bonus
quizSystems.description: Timer-based speed bonus calculated correctly

quizSystems.name: Combo Streak
quizSystems.description: Consecutive correct answers increment combo properly

quizSystems.name: Charge Multiplier
quizSystems.description: Charged correct answers apply correct damage multiplier

quizSystems.name: Echo Wrong Answers
quizSystems.description: Wrong answers create echo ghost cards correctly

quizSystems.name: Quiz Overlay Display
quizSystems.description: Quiz overlay renders correctly over combat

quizSystems.name: Answer Button Layout
quizSystems.description: Answer buttons sized and spaced correctly

quizSystems.name: Timer Display
quizSystems.description: Timer bar visible and accurate

quizSystems.name: Correct Answer Feedback
quizSystems.description: Green flash/animation on correct answer

quizSystems.name: Wrong Answer Feedback
quizSystems.description: Red flash/animation on wrong answer

quizSystems.name: Fact Reveal
quizSystems.description: Correct answer revealed after wrong answer

testingRecommendations.notes: Test each card type in combat scenarios
Verify each relic effect triggers correctly
Test enemy intents, phases, special mechanics
Test each room type renders and functions
Test each event choice and outcome
Test fact delivery, scheduling, variety per domain
Test each effect application and expiry
Test fact counts, domain filtering, cross-domain runs

questionFormats.name: Tier 1
questionFormats.description: 3 options, forward only, no close distractors

questionFormats.name: Tier 2B
questionFormats.description: 5 options, reverse + fill-blank allowed, close distractors

relicTriggers.name: Permanent
relicTriggers.description: Always active; no trigger event needed

relicTriggers.name: On Encounter Start
relicTriggers.description: Fires at the start of each combat encounter

relicTriggers.name: On Turn Start
relicTriggers.description: Fires at the start of each player turn

relicTriggers.name: On Turn End
relicTriggers.description: Fires at the end of each player turn

relicTriggers.name: On Attack
relicTriggers.description: Fires whenever the player plays an attack card

relicTriggers.name: On Block
relicTriggers.description: Fires whenever the player gains block

relicTriggers.name: On Kill
relicTriggers.description: Fires when the player kills an enemy

relicTriggers.name: On Damage Taken
relicTriggers.description: Fires whenever the player takes damage

relicTriggers.name: On Lethal
relicTriggers.description: Fires when the player would otherwise die

relicTriggers.name: On Correct Answer
relicTriggers.description: Fires each time the player answers a quiz question correctly

relicTriggers.name: On Wrong Answer
relicTriggers.description: Fires each time the player answers a quiz question incorrectly

relicTriggers.name: On Speed Bonus
relicTriggers.description: Fires when the player earns a speed bonus on a question

relicTriggers.name: On Perfect Turn
relicTriggers.description: Fires when the player completes a turn with all correct answers

relicTriggers.name: On Card Play
relicTriggers.description: Fires whenever any card is played

relicTriggers.name: On Echo Play
relicTriggers.description: Fires when a card is played via the Echo mechanic

relicTriggers.name: On Card Skip
relicTriggers.description: Fires when the player skips a card without playing it

relicTriggers.name: On Multi Hit
relicTriggers.description: Fires once per hit when a multi-hit card resolves

relicTriggers.name: On Run Start
relicTriggers.description: Fires once when a new run begins

relicTriggers.name: On Floor Advance
relicTriggers.description: Fires each time the player advances to a new dungeon floor

relicTriggers.name: On Boss Kill
relicTriggers.description: Fires when the player defeats a boss enemy

relicTriggers.name: On Parry
relicTriggers.description: Fires when the player fully absorbs an attack with block

relicTriggers.name: On Overheal
relicTriggers.description: Fires when healing would exceed the player's max HP

relicTriggers.name: On Encounter End
relicTriggers.description: Fires at the end of each combat encounter

relicTriggers.name: On Charge Correct
relicTriggers.description: Fires when a correct answer contributes to a mastery charge

relicTriggers.name: On Charge Wrong
relicTriggers.description: Fires when a wrong answer drains a mastery charge

relicTriggers.name: On Chain Complete
relicTriggers.description: Fires when a full answer chain is completed without error

relicTriggers.name: On Surge Start
relicTriggers.description: Fires when an enemy enters surge/enrage mode

enemyIntents.name: Attack
enemyIntents.description: Enemy deals damage to the player this turn

enemyIntents.name: Defend
enemyIntents.description: Enemy gains block to absorb incoming damage

enemyIntents.name: Buff
enemyIntents.description: Enemy applies a positive status effect to itself

enemyIntents.name: Debuff
enemyIntents.description: Enemy applies a negative status effect to the player

enemyIntents.name: Heal
enemyIntents.description: Enemy restores some of its own HP

enemyIntents.name: Multi Attack
enemyIntents.description: Enemy strikes the player multiple times in one turn

enemyIntents.name: Charge
enemyIntents.description: Enemy telegraphs a powerful attack to be unleashed next turn

cardKeywords.name: Block
cardKeywords.description: Absorbs incoming damage before HP is reduced. Expires at end of turn.

cardKeywords.name: Poison
cardKeywords.description: Deals damage each turn equal to the poison stack count, then reduces by 1.

cardKeywords.name: Weakness
cardKeywords.description: Reduces the afflicted unit's attack damage by 25%.

cardKeywords.name: Vulnerable
cardKeywords.description: Increases damage taken by 50% while the status is active.

cardKeywords.name: Thorns
cardKeywords.description: Reflects a fixed amount of damage back to any attacker.

cardKeywords.name: Persistent Block
cardKeywords.description: Like block, but does not expire at end of turn.

cardKeywords.name: Lifetap
cardKeywords.description: Heals the player for a percentage of the damage dealt.

cardKeywords.name: AP
cardKeywords.description: Action Points — the resource spent to play cards each turn.

cardKeywords.name: Echo
cardKeywords.description: Replays the previous card's effect once for free.

cardKeywords.name: Mastery Trial
cardKeywords.description: A bonus quiz challenge that, if passed, upgrades the card's mastery level.

cardKeywords.name: Inscription
cardKeywords.description: Played once and persists for the rest of combat. Exhausts on play and is permanently removed from game (cannot be Recollected). Pool = 1 per type — no stacking same-type inscriptions.
cardKeywords.notes: Three types: Fury (damage step 3), Iron (turn start block), Wisdom (CC draw+heal). Card definitions in AR-206/AR-208.

cardTypes.name: Attack
cardTypes.description: Deals damage to enemies; the primary offensive card type.

cardTypes.name: Shield
cardTypes.description: Grants block or defensive buffs; the primary defensive card type.

cardTypes.name: Utility
cardTypes.description: Manipulates the deck, hand, or turn flow without dealing direct damage.

cardTypes.name: Buff
cardTypes.description: Applies positive status effects to the player for sustained advantage.

cardTypes.name: Debuff
cardTypes.description: Applies negative status effects to enemies to weaken or control them.

cardTypes.name: Wild
cardTypes.description: Hybrid cards that combine effects from multiple types; rare and powerful.
